_README: Copy this file to config.json and edit it. This is the ONLY file you edit. See README.md and recipes/ for provider-specific values. Comments (keys starting with _) are ignored by the proxy.
_proxy: Optional proxy settings. Defaults are fine for almost everyone.

proxy._listen_port: Local port the proxy listens on. Claude Code is pointed here automatically by start.ps1/start.sh. Change only if 8141 is taken.
proxy._anthropic_upstream: Where the real Anthropic API lives. Don't change this unless you know why.
proxy._max_tokens_floor: Ultracode raises every request's max_tokens to at least this. 64000 matches real ultracode.

_models: What shows up in Claude Code's /model picker. id = internal id (MUST start with 'claude' or 'anthropic' or it gets dropped). display_name = the label you actually see — make it whatever you want.
_routes: Where each model id above actually goes. The key MUST match an id in 'models'. Fields: type ('openai_compat' for any OpenAI-chat backend, or 'anthropic' to pass straight through to Anthropic), upstream (backend base URL, no trailing /v1), model (the real model name AT that backend), auth ('passthrough' to reuse Claude Code's own OAuth, or a literal header like 'Bearer sk-...' or 'x-api-key: ...').
